title: corryocactus quadrangularis
intro: Corryocactus quadrangularis, also known as the 'Box Cactus' or 'Four-angled Cactus', is a species of flowering plant in the family Cactaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, where it is used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood sugar levels and its anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, and has been traditionally used to treat conditions like fever and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Corryocactus quadrangularis can be dried and crushed to make teas, infusions, or added to tinctures for its medicinal benefits.
